title: BingusCraft Gaming Edition
description: BingusCraft: Gaming Edition - A finely tuned Minecraft modpack for high-performance vanilla+ fun with friends
body:
# Focus
 <details>
<summary>Fun</summary>

BCGE is a modpack with a focus on playing with friends in a vanilla+ settings

</details>
 <details>
<summary>Building</summary>

More possibilites for creative buildings with the few mods Ive added for furniture and decor.

</details>
 <details>
<summary>Multiplayer</summary>

Essential mod helps bring friends together onto one world for zero cost.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Performance</summary>

With mods like Sodium, Indium, and more youre able to get plenty of frames on any hardware.

</details>
 <details>
<summary>Enhancements</summary>

Tons of mods to enhance the vanilla experience.

</details>

#

<details>
<summary>Recommendations</summary>
2GB+ of ram, and friends :D.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Hint!</summary>

BingusCraft: Gaming Edition is the best modpack to have fun with friends.
</details>
